description: Create a Search and Rescue (SAR) training scenario in the Solent environment located at /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/s) SAR Expanding Square/. The scenario should be set for 06:00 on 15/02/2025 with visibility and weather both at 3.0. The own ship, 'Lifeboat 1', starts at 50° 35.00' N, 001° 20.00' W, heading 000 at 15.0 knots. Program the ship to execute an 8-leg IAMSAR 'Expanding Square Search' (SS) pattern: Leg 1 (0.5nm North), Leg 2 (0.5nm East), Leg 3 (1.0nm South), Leg 4 (1.0nm West), Leg 5 (1.5nm North), Leg 6 (1.5nm East), Leg 7 (2.0nm South), and Leg 8 (2.0nm West). Position a target vessel named 'Missing Yacht' at the coordinates corresponding to the end of the 8th leg. Record the coordinates for all 8 waypoints in Degrees Decimal Minutes format in a text file at /home/ga/Documents/search_action_plan.txt.
